news.t: Main Management ETF Advisors Joins LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program
Income, growth or both? Weighing active ETFs in an up market

holdings.infoBox: BUYW is an equity ETF with a total of 20 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Main BuyWrite ETF (BUYW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks risk-adjusted total returns by actively investing in ETFs globally combined with an option writing strategy. BUYW was launched on Dec 29, 2015 and is issued by Main Management.

data.title: Main Management ETF Advisors Joins LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Main Management ETF Advisors ETFs BUYW, SECT, TMAT and INTL join LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program.

data.title: Income, growth or both? Weighing active ETFs in an up market
data.text: Protection plays were a prominent strategy last year, but the rally during the first half of 2023 is prompting more ETF investors to rethink the growth trade.

data.title: Why Buy-Write ETFs are trending downward this year
data.text: Kim Arthur, CEO of Main Management, joins 'Halftime Report' to discuss Buy-Write ETF strategies, international ETFs underperforming this year, and investing in ETFs according to market performance.
